title: Crispy Cassava Fritters with Citrusy Curry Dipping Sauce
description: A crispy and flavorful snack made with cassava, perfect for dipping in a tangy and citrusy curry sauce.

ingredients.name: green curry paste
ingredients.notes: made with coconut milk and spices

instructions: In a large bowl, combine grated cassava, flour, crispy rice flour, and egg.
Mix well until a dough forms.
Add curry powder and sugar (if using) to the dough and mix until combined.
Heat oil in a deep frying pan over medium-high heat.
Using a cookie scoop or spoon, drop small balls of dough into the hot oil.
Fry until golden brown and crispy, about 3-4 minutes.
Drain on paper towels and serve hot.
To make the dipping sauce, combine green curry paste, citrusy zest, and vegetable oil in a small bowl.
Serve the crispy fritters with the citrusy curry dipping sauce.
